name: Longstrider
description: You touch a creature. The target's speed increases by 10 feet until the spell ends. You can affect one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1st.
effect: Touch target gains +10 ft movement speed for 1 hour (no concentration required).
notes: Speed increase requires a speed-modifier effect in the effects system (1 hour = 60 minutes timer).
Minor movement utility, no concentration, 1-hour duration — straightforward transmutation buff. Correctly free.
